---
pagetitle: "Above .500 | Sports forecasts & models"
---

```{=html}
<span class="kicker">Above .500</span>
<h1 class="headline">Our models</h1>
<p class="dek">The forecasts, ratings and simulations behind Above .500 —
every model re-runs when the site is built.</p>
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
from importlib import import_module
from above500 import MODELS, render

rows = []
for m in MODELS:
    f = import_module(f"above500.{m['module']}").forecast()
    rows.append(render.model_row(m, updated=f["updated"], season=f["season"]))

print(render.section_head("Latest forecasts", "Updated daily"))
print(f'<div class="model-index">{"".join(rows)}</div>')
```
